privileged_info_summary: Discovered that the task is defective. Critical scripts (setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1) and the data file (lookout_mtn_centerline.dxf) are entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable as it will perpetually fail to generate task_result.json for the verifier. The target interval (25.0), tolerance (0.5), minimum expected points (25), and Lookout Mountain UTM bounds exactly match the task description and verifier.py logic.
